judge.reason: The primary purpose of audioreach_link_load is to configure ALSA DAI link fields (nonatomic, dynamic, platform name, platform of_node) for a topology component. The of_get_compatible_child call acquires a device_node reference, but this is only one step within broader business logic that includes multiple assignments and no direct return of the critical variable to the caller. The function does not focus on refcount management; the get is incidental.
